messages.content: so vet says koda has seasonal allergies
yeah hes fine. just really itchy
they did a skin scraping and stuff. no mites or infection
they prescribed apoquel for the itching. 1 pill a day
45 a month copay. insurance should cover most of the visit
where do we pick it up
king soopers on 9th. ill grab it tmrw
poor koda 🐶 give him extra treats tonight
just left the vet with koda
allergies are still bugging him. not as bad but still itchy
its helping some but not enough
vet is increasing the dose to see if that helps
few more weeks. if it doesnt improve they wanna do allergy testing
blood work or something idk exactly
was he good at the vet?
yeah tried to befriend every dog in the waiting room
what do u want for christmas
maybe a new garmin? mines getting kinda beat up
what about u what do u want
he keeps talking about that rei jacket
yeah ill take care of it
and ur mom. dont forget ur mom
im not gonna forget my mom
yeah nothing happening no heat at all
koda is shivering lol poor baby
ok looking up hvac places now
found a place, AAA Service Experts
k im turning on the oven for now
use the space heater from the garage
ok called them too, earliest they can come is sunday morning
i know everyone is slammed right before christmas
they said 10am sunday, guy named mike
lol itll be fine we have blankets
heat should be back in about an hour
igniter was shot they replaced it
yeah but at least we wont freeze on christmas lol
true 😅 thank god for credit cards
figure out the finances this month
we barely have enough for the mortgage
its fine my check hits friday
can we sit down this weekend?
im putting it on the calendar
love u. well figure it out ❤️
sarah already texted me she loved everything lol
the salmon turned out better than i expected
how much did all that food cost
really? those steaks were huge tho
we should have them over again soon
oh also kodas almost out of food
ya ill grab some in the morning
cant stop thinking about gregs email
the 5 year leadership commitment thing he sent today
something was bothering u at dinner
hes asking every principal to submit a 5 year vision plan. due march 1
not exactly but basically telling us to commit to staying for 5 years
can u call kevin this week
he says u keep dodging him
yeah im fine. hes just being trevor
i just cant really help him with that stuff
why not? its just an introduction right?
its not that simple. district stuff is all internal
dont want things to be weird
we are way lower than i thought
can you check our food spend
OMG did you get my email about the talent show?? I'm SO excited!! 😊
I have like a million ideas already lol
Got it. I'll look it over and get back to you
Take your time!! But not TOO much time haha 😊
Hey Matt just wondering if the Ramirez kid is doing the talent show this year?? She was SO good last time 🎤
Like I know she's had some stuff going on but honestly she should totally do it again
Hey Lena. Talent show sign ups havent started yet. Questions about specific students should go to the faculty advisors
Oh of course!! I wasn't trying to be nosy or anything!! 😊
I just remember her singing at the fall assembly and everyone was literally in tears
Oh and what about the Webber boy?? Is he still at Jefferson?? His magic act was SO funny 😂
Same thing, check with the advisors
Got it got it!! I just want all the kids to get a chance to shine 🌟
How's Claire btw?? Tell her I said hi!! 💕
We should do brunch soon!! Anyway talent show committee meeting first week of March work?? I have SO many ideas!!
Let me check the school calendar and get back to you
Hey Matt!! Are you free today around 2ish? I want to go over the talent show lineup with you before I finalize everything 😊
Also totally unrelated but I ran into Maria Ramirez at King Soopers and she seemed really off. Is everything ok with her daughter? Just want to make sure the family is doing alright ❤️
Are you sending the staff holiday lunch email or should I?
Catering confirmed for Sunday. 25 people, taco bar
Do you want me to set up the gift bags or are you handling that
I'll do it. Gifts arriving today
Sounds good. Already sent the reminder to staff
Welcome back! 3 parent meetings on the books this week just fyi
Fire drill Wednesday at 10. I'll handle assembly point logistics
Hey Matt I sent you an email about the parent contacts from the November fundraiser thread. Can you forward that when you get a sec?
Hey Matt, did you get a chance to send that parent list yet?
Just need those emails when you can 🙏

Hey Matt, any chance you can send over that parent contact list today? Committee meeting is Thursday and I need to get the volunteer emails out. Easiest if you can just forward the whole November thread so I can grab what I need.
did u see the CHUN email
yeah i signed up for our block
same! we should coordinate who brings what
we can haul bags with it
do we bring our own gloves?
nah they said theyll have gloves and bags at the check in table
ok so whos bringing what for saturday
bringing a push broom and a rake
got garden shears for the tree wells
my back is gonna hate me tmrw
haha same. good turnout for our block
Board materials due Friday. Need your section by Wednesday.
Working on it. Should have it done tomorrow.
Literacy initiative quarterly review moved to the 15th.
Budget variance numbers look off. Double check before Thursday.
Need Q3 enrollment projections first thing.
Will have them on your desk by 7:30.
Also need attendance figures for Q3.
hey matt! long time no talk. few of us were kicking around the idea of a CU reunion in june. you in?
hey man! yeah that could be fun
ill text u when dates are nailed down
hey rick quick question. the tile in the downstairs bathroom is cracking in one corner. is that still under warranty
hey matt big ask. im applying to the leadership program at CU denver and they want a professional reference. would you be down?
of course man. send me the details
ill email u the form tmrw
great ride. scott you were flying on the way back
whos in tmrw? thinking cherry creek trail
waterton tmrw? gonna be cold but rideable
wind is worse than i thought lol
just looked at the forecast. 25 mph gusts
that canyon headwind was no joke
worth it tho. those views never get old
my face is frozen but agreed lol
too cold tmrw. pushing to next week
930? sun wont warm up til then
when does it actually get warm
Heads up, pipe burst in the east wing bathroom. Called maintenance
Thank you, Denise. I will redirect students to the west wing restrooms.
ok so xmas is at our place this year
can u grab the tree this weekend
ill bring the good bourbon lol
mom and dad in on the 23rd
